commit_scope: Release dead Python fallback hooks from Form-kernel served API decisions.

commands: rg -n 'fallback=lambda|value-identical fallback|Python the value-identical fallback|python-fallback|run_with_fallback|fallback: Callable|fallback is accepted|_ = fallback' api/app/services/form_kernel_bridge.py api/app/routers api/tests scripts/runtime_surface_report.py scripts/kernel_readiness_harness.py scripts/kernel_attribution_report.py -g '!docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_*.json'

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py tests/test_household_service_board.py tests/test_discord_votes_heard.py tests/test_idea_standing_questions.py
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.summary: The bridge no longer accepts a fallback callable, and household/ideas route-local Python fallback bodies were removed. The focused API suite passed after building the required Rust kernel carrier: 39 passed, 3 skipped.

known_failed_attempts.command: cd api && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py tests/test_household_service_board.py tests/test_discord_votes_heard.py tests/test_idea_standing_questions.py

known_failed_attempts.resolution: Used the available python3 runner for the same test set.

known_failed_attempts.command: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py tests/test_household_service_board.py tests/test_discord_votes_heard.py tests/test_idea_standing_questions.py
known_failed_attempts.output: 6 failed, 27 passed, 9 skipped; failing endpoints raised RuntimeError because form-kernel-rust binary was absent.
known_failed_attempts.resolution: Built form-kernel-rust with cargo build --release --bin form-kernel-rust, then reran the same suite successfully.

known_failed_attempts.output: tests/test_agent_invitation.py::test_homepage_invites_anyone_or_anything_to_canonical_paths failed because the test searched web/app/page.tsx for English copy that now lives in web/messages/en.json.
known_failed_attempts.resolution: Updated the test to prove the page calls the translation keys and the English message catalog still carries the canonical invitation copy; focused pytest passes.

ci_validation.reason: Initial Thread Gates failed on a localized homepage source assertion; the focused failing test now passes locally and remote CI needs rerun after amended push.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy has run for this branch yet.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is passing; push, PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain.

evidence_refs: serve_via_kernel no longer exposes a fallback parameter or accepts route-local fallback callables.
Household and ideas helper bodies that only existed as ignored Python fallbacks were removed.
Focused route tests fail without the kernel carrier and pass once form-kernel-rust is built, proving the endpoint decisions require the kernel.
The homepage invitation test observes translated copy in web/messages/en.json instead of pinning localized text to the page component source.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Dead Python fallback hooks are gone; affected endpoint decisions continue to work only when the Form kernel carrier is available.
test_flows: Household request lifecycle, trace, gathering visibility, place lookup, and presence scan tests passed with the built kernel carrier.
Discord vote resonance reaches the idea cell through endpoint_reaction_resonance.fk.
Bridge structure-access and kernel latency/status tests passed without any fallback callable surface.
Homepage invitation source test passes against translated page wiring and English message content.
